allow: Bash(/opt/anaconda3/bin/python -c "import pandas as pd; df=pd.read_csv\('campañas_marketing_limpio.csv'\); print\('shape:', df.shape\); print\('nulos:', df.isnull\(\).sum\(\).sum\(\)\); print\('dtypes:'\); print\(df.dtypes\); print\('canales:', df.canal.unique\(\)\); print\('regions:', df.region.unique\(\)\); print\('ventas range:', df.ventas_usd.min\(\), df.ventas_usd.max\(\)\)")
